title: The Same.
content:
Hush'd on the hill

    Is the breeze;

    Scarce by the zephyr

    The trees

    Softly are press'd;
    The woodbird's asleep on the bough.
    Wait, then, and thou

    Soon wilt find rest.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Johann Wolfgang von Goethe delivers a powerful performance in "The Same."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
